behavior_summary: U8P_BONES4::look: When the player examines the bones, the script emits a short description bark "skeleton" and then suspends/ends the U8P_BONES4::look process.

U8P_BONES4::use: Handles player 'U8P_BONES4::use' on the bones. It reads the item's status word into a temporary local (local1) and tests status bit 0x0100. If that bit is set the script calls Item::closeGump(this) (closing any open UI for the item).

If bit 0x0100 is clear the script performs urandom(100). On a rare roll (result > 95, i.e. values 96–99, ~4% chance) it barks "Disturb my rest not, mortal!" and suspends the process; otherwise it opens the item's UI/gump via Item::openGump(0x0Ch, this).
No global flags are read or written by these processes in the extracted code; behavior is local to the item instance and its UI state.
notable_control_flow: U8P_BONES4::use branches on a status-bit test: (Item::getStatus(this) & 0x0100) ? close gump : continue.
When the status bit is clear, control flows to a probabilistic branch: urandom(100) > 95 triggers a warning bark + suspend; otherwise it opens gump id 0x0C.
U8P_BONES4::look is a straight-line process that barks then suspends/ends without further branching or external calls.
open_questions: What exact semantics does status bit 0x0100 encode for this item (open UI, locked state, or other)? This is inferred but not confirmed.

Does suspend in the 'U8P_BONES4::use' branch represent aborting the U8P_BONES4::use action, waiting for player input, or queuing further logic? The code suspends but the higher-level effect is not explicit here.
What content or interaction is provided by gump id 0x0C for the bones (inventory/detail UI, context menu, or quest dialog)?

main_function.name: U8P_BONES4::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short description when the player examines the bones item (display the one-word label and end the U8P_BONES4::look interaction).
entry_conditions: Player uses the Look / Examine action on the item
May also be triggered by entering the item's fast-area trigger associated with U8P_BONES4::look handlers (inferred)

function_map.name: U8P_BONES4::look
function_map.role: examine/description handler (produces a short bark when inspected)

function_map.name: U8P_BONES4::use
function_map.role: handle player 'U8P_BONES4::use' interaction: toggle/close UI if a status bit is set, otherwise possibly warn or open the item's gump

external_calls.purpose: Read the item's status/flag word into a temporary (local1) so the script can test bit 0x0100.
Close any open gump/UI associated with this item when status bit 0x0100 is set.
Produce a 0–99 random roll (urandom(100)) to decide a low-probability warning bark branch.
Open the item's gump/UI (gump id 0x0C) when the status bit is clear and the random check does not trigger the warning.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_BONES4::look: When the player examines the bones, the script emits a short description bark "skeleton" and then suspends/ends the U8P_BONES4::look process.
